vocal 0.3-12
  • Reference

    Functions for compliance checking

    check.Rd

    Functions for compliance checking. You can check whether variable names are accepted or not, and if required variables are avaialble. You can also check whether character values are accepted and weather other variables are within specficied ranges. Furthermore you can check whether coordinates are in the country specified; whether dates are valid or whether a (date) span is within an expected limit.

    check_variables(x, trms, required=TRUE, suggest=TRUE)
check_values(x, trms)
check_lonlat(x)
check_caps(x, vars, minchar=5, frac=0)
check_span(x, start, end, smin=0, smax=366)
check_date(x, name, trms=NULL)
check_datespan(x, startdate, enddate, smin=0, smax=366)

    Arguments

    x

    data.frame to check

    trms

    data.frame with the vocabulary. E.g. accepted_values("github:controvoc/terminag")

    required

    logical. If TRUE the presence of required variables is checked

    suggest

    logical. If TRUE, unknown variable names are reported with a close match from the vocabulary (Levenshtein distance, as in carobiner::draft)

    name

    character. The variable name. For example, "planting_date"

    vars

    character. The variables to check

    minchar

    positive integer

    frac

    numeric

    start

    numeric

    end

    numeric

    smin

    numeric

    smax

    numeric

    startdate

    Date

    enddate

    Date

    Value

    data.frame

    Examples

    
set_vocabulary("github:controvoc/terminag")
trms <- vocal::accepted_variables(exclude=c("metadata", "carob-metadata"))

x <- data.frame(
  dataset_id = 1,
  country="Côte d'Ivoire",
  location = "Taï",
  admin1 = "Montagnes",
  longitude=10,
  lat=12,
  longitude = -7.6,
  latitude = 5.875,
  yield = 3969,
  yield_part = "roots",
  crop = "manioc", # should be "cassava"
  planting_date = "2030-01-01",
  harvest_date = "2035-01-01",
  N_fertilizer = 100,
  P_fertilizer = 25,
  K_fertilize = -10,
  irrigated = FALSE,
  test = 0
)

check_variables(x, trms, required=FALSE, suggest=FALSE)
#>               check                                         msg
#> 1 unknown variables admin1, lat, longitude.1, K_fertilize, test

check_variables(x, trms, required=FALSE, suggest=TRUE)
#>               check                         msg
#> 1  unknown variable              admin1 (adm1?)
#> 2  unknown variable             lat (latitude?)
#> 3  unknown variable    longitude.1 (longitude?)
#> 4  unknown variable K_fertilize (K_fertilizer?)
#> 5 unknown variables                        test

check_variables(x, trms, required=TRUE)
#>               check
#> 1  unknown variable
#> 2  unknown variable
#> 3  unknown variable
#> 4  unknown variable
#> 5 unknown variables
#> 6 missing variables
#>                                                                           msg
#> 1                                                              admin1 (adm1?)
#> 2                                                             lat (latitude?)
#> 3                                                    longitude.1 (longitude?)
#> 4                                                 K_fertilize (K_fertilizer?)
#> 5                                                                        test
#> 6 trial_id, on_farm, is_survey, yield_moisture, geo_from_source, K_fertilizer

vocal::check_values(x, trms)
#>           check                                 msg
#> 1  bad datatype dataset_id (numeric, not character)
#> 2 invalid terms                        crop: manioc

check_date(x, "planting_date")
#>   check                              msg
#> 1  date future date(s) in: planting_date

check_datespan(x, "planting_date", "harvest_date")
#>      check                                                   msg
#> 1 datespan 1 harvest_date more than 366 days after planting_date

check_lonlat(x)
#> Cached as: /home/runner/.local/share/.carob/gadm/gadm36_adm0_r1_pk.rds
#>                          check                    msg
#> 1 coordinates in wrong country Cameroon/Côte d'Ivoire

    Contents
